about: We are an online retail business selling electronics and accessories, offering customer support for orders, refunds, cancellations, and product inquiries.
business_hours: Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 9 PM. Closed on Sundays and occasional holidays

policies.refund_policy: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the returned item is received and approved. Items must be returned within 14 days of delivery, unused and in original packaging.
policies.cancellation_policy: Orders can be cancelled free of charge within 24 hours of placing them. After that, cancellation is only possible if the order hasn't shipped yet.
policies.shipping_policy: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days within major cities, and 5-7 business days for other areas. Express shipping (1-2 days) is available at extra cost.
